title: Try, Try Again
lesson: If you fall down, you can get back up and try again.
prompts: On a sunny park path — green grass, leafy trees, warm sunlight — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image is sitting on a red BMX-style pedal bicycle with a diamond frame and exactly two wheels total, one front tire and one rear tire, the rear axle bare with no small side attachments, both round pedals and the crank clearly visible on the near side, both feet resting on the pedals, wearing a snug safety helmet, with an excited smile. {GENDER_M_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} stands nearby, one hand resting gently on the bicycle seat, smiling encouragingly. Eye-level medium shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

On a sunny park path — green grass, leafy trees, warm sunlight — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image is wobbling on the red BMX-style pedal bicycle with a diamond frame and exactly two wheels total, one front tire and one rear tire, the rear axle bare with no small side attachments, both round pedals and the crank clearly visible on the near side, wearing the safety helmet, leaning slightly to one side with a surprised expression. {GENDER_M_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} stands nearby, reaching out a hand, looking watchful and ready to help. Eye-level three-quarter shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

On a sunny park path — green grass, leafy trees, warm sunlight — after a gentle tumble, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image is sitting safely on the green grass a full step in front of an empty red BMX-style pedal bicycle toppled on its side, the bicycle's diamond frame and exactly two wheels total visible, one front tire and one rear tire, the rear axle bare with no small side attachments, round pedals, and crank clearly visible, still wearing the safety helmet, with a tiny pout but no tears. {GENDER_M_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} kneels nearby, leaning in kindly and offering an open hand. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

On a sunny park path — green grass, leafy trees, warm sunlight — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image is standing on the grass with both feet flat on the ground, wearing the safety helmet, bending slightly to brush grass off one knee with both hands and a determined little smile; a separate empty red BMX-style pedal bicycle rests upright beside them, with a diamond frame and exactly two wheels total, one front tire and one rear tire, the rear axle bare with no small side attachments, both round pedals and the crank clearly visible on the near side. {GENDER_M_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} crouches nearby, clapping and cheering them on warmly. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

On a sunny park path — green grass, leafy trees, warm sunlight — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image is riding the red BMX-style pedal bicycle a short way, with a diamond frame and exactly two wheels total, one front tire and one rear tire, the rear axle bare with no small side attachments, both round pedals and the crank clearly visible on the near side, wearing the safety helmet, beaming with delight, feet lifted from the ground. {GENDER_M_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} stands in the background, cheering with both arms raised. Eye-level three-quarter shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

On a sunny park path — green grass, leafy trees, golden afternoon light — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image is standing proudly while holding the handlebar of the red BMX-style pedal bicycle, only the bicycle's handlebar, front fork, one front tire, pedals, and crank visible in the tighter frame, wearing the safety helmet, with a big happy smile. {GENDER_M_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} kneels nearby, cheering and giving a thumbs-up with a proud, delighted expression. Eye-level medium shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.
gists: On a sunny park path, the child sits on a little red two-wheel pedal bike wearing a helmet, excited, while the father rests a hand on the bike encouragingly — ready to ride.
On the park path, the child wobbles on the red two-wheel pedal bike, leaning to one side with a surprised look, while the father reaches out, ready to help.
On the park path after a gentle tumble, the child sits safely on the grass beside the red two-wheel pedal bike, showing a small pout but no tears, while the father kneels offering an open hand.
On the park path, the child stands back up beside the red two-wheel pedal bike, brushing off grass with a determined smile, while the father crouches clapping and cheering — trying again.
On the park path, the child rides the red two-wheel pedal bike a short way, beaming, while the father further back cheers with arms raised — the child succeeds.
On the park path in golden light, the child stands proudly by the red two-wheel pedal bike, grinning big, while the father kneels giving a proud thumbs-up — never gave up.
texts: {NAME} sat on a little red two-wheel bike, helmet on tight. "I'm ready to ride!" said {NAME}. "Steady and brave," said Dad, smiling beside the bike.
{NAME} pushed off — but wibble, wobble! The bike tipped to one side as Dad reached out. "Whoa!" cried {NAME}. "I've got a hand close by," called Dad.
Down {NAME} went onto the soft green grass. Dad knelt and held out his hand. "I can't do it," {NAME} sighed. "Falling is part of learning," said Dad.
Dad clapped beside the bike. "Try again when the brave feeling comes," he said kindly. "Okay," said {NAME}, standing up and brushing off the grass.
{NAME} pushed off once more and — was riding! "Look at me go!" laughed {NAME}. "Hooray!" cheered Dad, arms up high.
{NAME} stood proudly by the red two-wheel bike with a great big grin. "Great riding!" said Dad. "I never gave up!" said {NAME}.
